title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
